response.justification: While the candidate has extensive software engineering experience and matches several advantageous skills like Node.js and React, they lack the core requirements of the role. Specifically, they have very limited and dated C++ experience (7 months in 2015) and no background in industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443) or IoT protocols (MQTT, Modbus) essential for this Senior Manager C++ Developer role.
strengths: Extensive overall software development experience (15+ years) with strong proficiency in Node.js, React, and TypeScript, matching the advantageous skills.
Proven track record of building and scaling event-driven architectures, microservices, and distributed platforms.
Demonstrated technical leadership and mentoring capabilities, including organizing dojos, founding platforms, and utilizing Agile/TDD practices.
concerns: Severe lack of recent and deep C++ and STL experience, which is the primary technical competency required for this role.
No mentioned experience with industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443) or Secure Development Lifecycle (SDL) practices.
Missing required industrial IoT and communication protocol experience (e.g., MQTT, Modbus TCP/IP, OPC UA).
